strengths: Diverse experience in software development across multiple platforms and technologies
Proven track record of leading and contributing to complex projects
Strong background in AI and cloud-related technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI strategy and cloud platform strategy
Limited experience in management or director-level roles
No explicit mention of experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) beyond code generators and frameworks
response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development and has worked on diverse projects, including some related to AI and cloud technologies. However, there is a lack of direct experience in AI strategy and cloud platform strategy, and limited experience in director-level roles.
